host_patterns.description: Optional. When declared, devlane renders hostnames and emits them in the manifest. Omit to use port-based discovery on localhost.

dev.description: Must contain the {lane} placeholder so different dev lanes produce different hostnames.

runtime.description: Optional. Declaring compose_files opts into the containerized pattern. Declaring run.commands gives devlane up something to surface for bare-metal apps.

run.description: Optional bare-metal command declarations. When absent, devlane up is a no-op for bare-metal. When present, devlane up prints the rendered commands and exits. Devlane never spawns bare-metal processes (supervised-substrate rule, docs/00-principles.md) and never implicitly runs prepare. In Phase 2, if the adapter declares ports and any declared service is still unallocated, devlane up fails before printing commands and points the caller at prepare.

command.description: Shell command with {{...}} templating. Scope matches generated templates: Phase 1 exposes the Phase 1 manifest groups plus env.<KEY>; Phase 2 adds ready and flattened ports.<name>.

name.description: Service identity used as the manifest ports object key and catalog service key. Simple names such as web or api are easiest to reference from templates. Slash-delimited names are accepted; DEVLANE_PORT_* env keys are sanitized from the final path segment and must remain unique after sanitization.

health_path.description: Optional HTTP path (e.g., /healthz). When set, the manifest emits a health_url for this port as http://localhost:<port><health_path>.

stable_port.description: Optional. When declared, the stable lane asserts this port as a fixture at prepare time. When omitted, 'default' plays both roles (dev-lane hint + stable fixture). Declaring stable_port lets 'default' differ from the stable fixture if a team wants a distinct preference for dev lanes.

pool_hint.description: Optional [low, high] pair. When set, dev-lane pool allocation walks this subrange first before falling back to the host-wide port_range. Must sit inside the host port_range or allocation falls back immediately.

reserved.description: Optional. Additional ports the catalog should never allocate for this app. Merged with the host-wide reserved list from ~/.config/devlane/config.yaml. Additive only; adapter reserved cannot un-reserve host reserved.

worktree.description: Optional. Controls Phase 3 worktree lifecycle behavior.

seed.description: Explicit list of paths (relative to adapterRoot, the directory containing devlane.yaml) to copy from the source checkout into a new worktree, before prepare runs. Directories are copied recursively. Absolute paths are rejected, normalized paths may not escape repoRoot (the Git worktree root), and copy destinations must remain inside the target worktree root. Missing source files warn and continue. Paths that also appear in outputs.generated are skipped with a notice. No defaults; devlane does not guess which files are sensitive.

compose_env_path.description: Required when runtime.compose_files is declared. Omit for pure bare-metal or CLI adapters.

destination.description: Resolved relative to adapterRoot and must remain inside repoRoot. Absolute paths outside the checkout are refused at prepare time.
